chain.label: 在当前标签页打开链接
chain.name: COMMAND_OPEN_LINK_CURRENT
chain.param: javascript:(function() { const host = window.location.hostname; if (!/google\.|bing\.com|duckduckgo\.com|baidu\.com/.test(host)) return; const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search); const q = /baidu\.com/.test(host) ? params.get('wd') : params.get('q'); if (q) window.location.href = 'https://grok.com/?q=' + encodeURIComponent(q); })();
